evals.prompt: Write a Flutter widget that displays a user's name with a blue text color.
evals.expected_output: Pre-write audit: flutter-design-system skill loaded. SKILL VIOLATION DETECTED — Rule: No hardcoded colors. Violation: Colors.blue. Fix: Theme.of(context).colorScheme.primary. Auto-fixed: YES. Root Cause: PATTERN_MISMATCH. User Intent: User asked for a text widget with blue color. Skill Gap: suggestion to strengthen anti-pattern. Then writes corrected code.

evals.prompt: Create a SKILL.md for a new React hooks skill with detailed examples and explanations.
evals.expected_output: After drafting: SKILL.md is 120 lines — exceeds 100-line limit (skill-creator rule). Report violation with Root Cause AMBIGUOUS_RULE or MISSING_COVERAGE, populate User Intent and Skill Gap. Then extract large code blocks to references/ and rewrite to meet the limit.

evals.prompt: Add a TypeScript function that uses a class component pattern for React.
evals.expected_output: Pre-write check: react-component-patterns skill loaded for .tsx. Violation: class components are prohibited. Report includes Root Cause, User Intent (user asked to add a component), and Skill Gap (how to strengthen the rule). Auto-fix by converting to arrow function component.

evals.prompt: I'm using Next.js 14 App Router but the skill told me to put my route in the pages/ directory.
evals.expected_output: Violation detected: skill references pages/ directory — outdated for Next.js 14 App Router. Root Cause: OUTDATED_GUIDANCE. User Intent: user is building a route with App Router. Skill Gap: update skill to distinguish Pages Router vs App Router with version callout.
